commands.review_summary:
The PR passes botOpenId into Feishu synthetic card-action message construction, adds group-only bot mention metadata, and tests group and p2p callback behavior.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +27. Total +45 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main synthesizes Feishu group card-action messages without message.mentions, while the existing group activation gate requires a detected bot mention when requireMention is true. I did not run a live Feishu callback in this read-only review.
